result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, ready to capture that important idea, draft that quarterly update, or outline the proposal that's been rattling around in your head — and then you freeze. The cursor blinks. The page stays empty. What should have been a five-minute start becomes a thirty-minute warm-up. We built Smart Drafts because we kept hearing the same thing from so many of you: the hardest part isn't writing, it's starting.

Smart Drafts turns that first blank moment into a running start. Give your document a title, click the new Smart Drafts button, and you'll get a tailored outline drawn from your title and the context of your recent work — the projects you've been in, the docs you've been collaborating on, the shape of the writing you already do. It's not a template and it's not a guess; it's a thoughtful scaffold you can accept, reshape, or discard entirely. You're always in the driver's seat, and everything stays private to your workspace.

This is just the first step. We're already working on custom voice training, which will let Smart Drafts learn the rhythm and tone of *your* writing — so the outlines you get feel less like a helpful assistant and more like a trusted collaborator who knows how you think. We can't wait to put it in your hands. In the meantime, try Smart Drafts on your next doc and let us know what you think: we read every note, and your feedback is what shapes where we go next.

# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, ready to capture that important idea, draft that quarterly update, or outline the proposal that's been rattling around in your head — and then you freeze. The cursor blinks. The page stays empty. What should have been a five-minute start becomes a thirty-minute warm-up. We built Smart Drafts because we kept hearing the same thing from so many of you: the hardest part isn't writing, it's starting.

Smart Drafts turns that first blank moment into a running start. Give your document a title, click the new Smart Drafts button, and you'll get a tailored outline drawn from your title and the context of your recent work — the projects you've been in, the docs you've been collaborating on, the shape of the writing you already do. It's not a template and it's not a guess; it's a thoughtful scaffold you can accept, reshape, or discard entirely. You're always in the driver's seat, and everything stays private to your workspace.

This is just the first step. We're already working on custom voice training, which will let Smart Drafts learn the rhythm and tone of *your* writing — so the outlines you get feel less like a helpful assistant and more like a trusted collaborator who knows how you think. We can't wait to put it in your hands. In the meantime, try Smart Drafts on your next doc and let us know what you think: we read every note, and your feedback is what shapes where we go next.
